meaning: n.[鑽痌鍒槍鍛ら唶(娌荤棝椋庤嵂)
examples: Allopurinol is an appropriate long term urate lowering therapy.
The aim of this study was to determine if allopurinol decreases the rate of PEP.
In addition, the decrease in ambulatory BP was directly correlated with allopurinol treatment.
In patients who took allopurinol alone, the risk of gout attack was reduced by 53%.
Even more, the risk for gout attacks was decreased by nearly 75% when cherry intake was combined with allopurinol use.
